original_text:
### Gradient Specifications (approved set — never invent gradients)
| Gradient | Stops | Usage |
|---|---|---|
| Brand Blue → Dark Navy | `#00529b` → `#011E45` | Dark backgrounds, blue masthead/waves |
| Sky Blue → Deep Blue | `#358CCB` → `#003D74` | Blue backgrounds, waves |
| Sunshine → 75% Gold | `#faa31b` → Gold @75% | Warm backgrounds |
| Golden Sand → White → Light Blue | `#FEF1C8` → `#ffffff` → `#E6F0F9` | Soft light backgrounds |
| Golden Sand → 75% Gold → Sunshine | `#FEF1C8` → Gold @75% → `#faa31b` | Warm light-to-saturated backgrounds |
| Sunshine → 0C,10M,78Y,0K (≈`#ffe05c` light gold) | `#faa31b` → light gold | **Masthead gradient — the gradient to use with the logo mark for contrast; mark sits at the lightest end** |
- Gradients run horizontally in masthead/banner applications (dark/saturated → light, left → right as shown).
- Used as backgrounds, in combination with the wave graphic, and with the LISRAYA logo mark. Approved values only.

relations.note: Masthead gradient is one member of the approved set, with a specific logo-mark usage.
Orientation/usage rules govern how approved gradients are applied.

quotes: Gradient Specifications (approved set — never invent gradients)

rules.intent: Constrain all gradients to the approved brand set.
rules.rule_text: Use only the approved gradient set — never invent gradients. Approved gradients and their usage: Brand Blue → Dark Navy (#00529b → #011E45) for dark backgrounds and blue masthead/waves; Sky Blue → Deep Blue (#358CCB → #003D74) for blue backgrounds and waves; Sunshine → 75% Gold (#faa31b → Gold @75%) for warm backgrounds; Golden Sand → White → Light Blue (#FEF1C8 → #ffffff → #E6F0F9) for soft light backgrounds; Golden Sand → 75% Gold → Sunshine (#FEF1C8 → Gold @75% → #faa31b) for warm light-to-saturated backgrounds; and the Masthead gradient Sunshine → light gold (#faa31b → ≈#ffe05c) for use with the logo mark. Approved values only.

quotes: Masthead gradient — the gradient to use with the logo mark for contrast; mark sits at the lightest end
**Masthead gradient — the gradient to use with the logo mark for contrast; mark sits at the lightest end**

rules.intent: Ensure logo mark contrast on the masthead.
rules.rule_text: The Masthead gradient (Sunshine → light gold, #faa31b → ≈#ffe05c) is the gradient to use with the LISRAYA logo mark for contrast; the mark sits at the lightest end of the gradient.

quotes: Gradients run horizontally in masthead/banner applications (dark/saturated → light, left → right as shown).
Gradients run horizontally in masthead/banner applications (dark/saturated → light, left → right as shown).
Used as backgrounds, in combination with the wave graphic, and with the LISRAYA logo mark. Approved values only.

rules.intent: Enforce consistent gradient orientation and application contexts.
rules.rule_text: In masthead/banner applications gradients run horizontally, from dark/saturated to light (left → right as shown). Gradients are used as backgrounds, in combination with the wave graphic, and with the LISRAYA logo mark — approved values only.
